title: BullMQ mailer has no DLQ / retry config
detail: The mailer.processor.ts does not configure a Dead Letter Queue or max retry count. Failed email jobs are silently dropped after exhausting Bull default retries.
fix: Add `attempts: 3, backoff: { type: 'exponential', delay: 5000 }` to the job options in mailer.service.ts and set up a failed-job event listener.

title: No HTTPS / CORS config in main.ts
detail: main.ts enables CORS via `app.enableCors()` without an explicit allowedOrigins list. In production this allows any origin. SSL termination is expected at the reverse-proxy level but not documented.
fix: Pass `origin: process.env.CORS_ORIGINS?.split(',')` to `enableCors()`. Document that SSL must be terminated at the proxy.
